headline: Community Store, auto-backups, and conversational control
items: 🛍️ **Store tab** — browse and install community workers directly from bfrost.net without touching the terminal.
🔔 **Update notifications** — the app checks for newer versions of your installed workers daily and shows a badge in the sidebar.
💾 **Automatic backups** — daily snapshots at 03:00, configurable retention, and one-click restore on next startup.
🚨 **Stuck job detector** — if a job fails 3 times in a row, a warning banner appears in the Overview with a direct link to fix it.
🧹 **Factory reset** — new Danger Zone panel in System lets you wipe worker state, credentials, or backups with a confirmation step.
🔐 **Sideload from .zip** — drag-drop a worker bundle directly from the Store tab without a terminal.
📡 **Discord notifications** — a new Discord worker sends operator alerts to any Discord channel.
and it reads the Item Bus live.

headline: First public preview
items: 🚀 **Worker-first platform** — install, configure, schedule, and run workers from the dashboard.
📰 **News Digest worker** — daily AI-curated news summaries delivered to Telegram or the dashboard.
🐦 **Post to X worker** — publish AI-generated posts on a schedule.
📚 **Research Notes worker** — AI-written Markdown notes on any topic, saved locally.
🤖 **Telegram channel** — two-way chat with your BFrost assistant from Telegram.
⚙️ **LM Studio integration** — run local AI models with no API keys or monthly bill.
